ground_truth.title: Laptop review/recommendation resources
ground_truth.main_content: A forum discussion thread asking for laptop review and recommendation resources. The original post states: 'I am in need of a new laptop as my power connector is completely shot. Laptops are not really in the wheelhouse of the tech youtube crowd I'm familiar with, is there a good source like L1T, GN, HWUB, etc but focused on laptops someone can recommend? I don't need much from it, so not looking to spend a ton, but I still want it to be capable. Mostly used for browsing and media consumption while laying in bed, but when I travel I'd do light-medium gaming on it. Therefore would like to have some...'. Community members provide various resource recommendations and suggestions for laptop purchasing.
with: A forum discussion thread asking for laptop review and recommendation resources.
without: Loading spinner and page preloader elements
Discourse forum software branding and footer
User avatar and profile UI elements
